title: Speed-to-value messaging resurfaces in 62% of discovery calls
anchor: Gong analysis of 27 April discovery calls shows the speed-to-value frame restated by prospects in 17 conversations.
connect: Platform-consolidation messaging appears in 5 calls over the same window.
body: Gong analysis of 27 April discovery calls shows the speed-to-value frame restated by prospects in 17 conversations. Platform-consolidation messaging appears in 5 calls over the same window.
trace: Speed-to-value dominated last year before rebrand, now showing strong prospect pickup again in discovery stage.

title: Beacon Systems head-to-head win rate climbs to 64%
anchor: Q2 Beacon competitive deals closed at 14-8 record across 22 head-to-head opportunities.
connect: Prior four-quarter average versus Beacon ran at 28%.
body: Q2 Beacon competitive deals closed at 14-8 record across 22 head-to-head opportunities. Prior four-quarter average versus Beacon ran at 28%.
trace: Major competitive reversal against primary competitor, 36-point win rate improvement versus trailing baseline.

title: Battlecard utilization crosses 61% on competitive opportunities
anchor: Q2 competitive deals show 38 of 62 opportunities with battlecard opens, up from 22% in Q1.
connect: Asset-opening reps generated 2.4x the pipeline of non-opening reps in the April launch window.
body: Q2 competitive deals show 38 of 62 opportunities with battlecard opens, up from 22% in Q1. Asset-opening reps generated 2.4x the pipeline of non-opening reps in the April launch window.
trace: Significant enablement behavior change correlating with pipeline performance lift.

title: ICP match rate on new logos hits 78% in Q2
anchor: Q2 new customer acquisition shows 28 of 36 closed deals matching the ideal customer profile versus 23 of 36 in Q1.
connect: ICP-aligned wins close 12 days faster than non-ICP wins on average.
body: Q2 new customer acquisition shows 28 of 36 closed deals matching the ideal customer profile versus 23 of 36 in Q1. ICP-aligned wins close 12 days faster than non-ICP wins on average.
trace: 14-point improvement in ICP alignment with velocity bonus on aligned deals.

title: Verge IO appears in 24% of Q2 competitive deals
anchor: 18 of 75 Q2 competitive opportunities included Verge IO, up from 11% in Q1, concentrating in mid-market.
connect: Verge IO raised $40M Series B on March 14.
body: 18 of 75 Q2 competitive opportunities included Verge IO, up from 11% in Q1, concentrating in mid-market. Verge IO raised $40M Series B on March 14.
trace: New competitor emergence following funding event, mid-market segment concentration.

title: Northstar objection handling lifts win rate to 51%
anchor: Head-to-head deals with Northstar Platform closed at 51% after the April 8 battlecard update versus 42% before.
connect: Northstar mentions in Gong transcripts decreased 22% in the four weeks following the update.
body: Head-to-head deals with Northstar Platform closed at 51% after the April 8 battlecard update versus 42% before. Northstar mentions in Gong transcripts decreased 22% in the four weeks following the update.
trace: Tactical battlecard improvement showing immediate win rate and mention frequency impact.

title: April 8 launch generates $420K pipeline in first three weeks
anchor: Atlas CRM Sync launch produced 14 new opportunities totaling $420,000 across the initial three-week window.
connect: Prior October launch generated $310,000 in the same timeframe.
body: Atlas CRM Sync launch produced 14 new opportunities totaling $420,000 across the initial three-week window. Prior October launch generated $310,000 in the same timeframe.
trace: Launch pipeline generation 35% ahead of prior launch baseline.

title: Launch-attributable pipeline crosses 18% of Q2 net new

connect: Launch pipeline generated 2.0x the prior launch's first-7-day volume.
body: Q2 total net new pipeline sits at $3.4M with $620K attributed to launch activity. Launch pipeline generated 2.0x the prior launch's first-7-day volume.
trace: Launch contribution to overall pipeline generation with velocity comparison.

title: May 15 launch readiness clears 10 days ahead of ship

connect: Prior launch positioning brief signed off 2 days before ship.
body: Atlas Forecast Pro positioning brief, battlecard update, and sales briefing signed off May 5 versus May 15 ship date. Prior launch positioning brief signed off 2 days before ship.
trace: Launch execution timing improvement, 12-day buffer versus prior last-minute completion.

title: Earned media pickup rate reaches 42% on April announcement

connect: Prior launch achieved 28% pickup rate across the same outreach approach.
body: 22 of 53 outreached publications picked up the April 8 launch announcement. Prior launch achieved 28% pickup rate across the same outreach approach.

title: Close reason capture hits 92% in Q2 deals

body: Implementation timeline and integration breadth themes from 14 April exit interviews appear in Beacon competitive opportunities. 6 themes surfaced from April customer interviews with 2 feeding the positioning revision.

body: 27 of 38 reps opened battlecard or one-pager within 14 days of the April 8 launch versus 42% on prior launch. Reps who opened launch assets produced 2.4x the pipeline of those who did not.
